rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF DONALD J REBELLO
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 12/4/18: 1. Proof of Service showing proper notice of the First Amendment still has not been filed. 2. Notice of a pleading cannot be given until after that pleading has been filed. The POS for the Second Amendment was accepted for filing only one minute after the Second Amendment was accepted for filed. Therefore, notice of the Second Amendment is invalid. Please give proper notice of both the First Amendment and the Second Amendment.
